text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon, in the quiet town of Everwood, nestled among whispering pines, there lived a curious kitten named Willow. Willow loved nothing more than exploring the cobwebs and fallen leaves. Her adventure today took her to the old oak tree near the riverbank.

She scampered up the gnarly branches searching for a secret stash. While climbing higher she saw bubbles rising. Curious, Willow jumped.

Inside one bubble was a tiny parakeet. Feeling brave, Willow invited her friend along. The parakeet chirped happily. Together they fluttered down among the leaves.

"Why do you flutter?" asked Willow.

"To find tasty berries."

There were berries! Willow grabbed one. They giggled together. Then something fell from above.

A hawk! Willow watched as it swooped down.

"Weird..." She whispered.

The parakeet fluttered away quickly. Willow chased after her. They flew above the trees shouting fun giggles.
